quantity_unit_omitted: Returned the numeric lab value without the required measurement unit.
boundary_threshold_misapplied: Applied the replacement threshold incorrectly at the cutoff value, treating a borderline low result as normal.
omitted_conditional_followup_order: Reported the lab result but failed to place the required follow-up order when the date condition was met.
patient_identifier_used_as_resource_refe: Used the patient's external identifier/MRN directly in a FHIR reference field instead of the resolved Patient resource id.
answer_format_split_across_multiple_item: Returned the answer fragmented across multiple list items instead of the expected consolidated format.
datetime_precision_dropped: Returned only a date string after retrieving a timestamped result, losing required time precision.
patient_age_miscalculated: Computed the patient's age incorrectly from the Patient resource demographics.
overwrote_correct_value_with_wrong_one: After reaching a plausible answer, replaced it with a different final value.
answer_format_narrative_instead_of_field: Returned a free-text summary where the task expected discrete answer fields/values.
premature_no_result_conclusion: Queried the likely correct resource but concluded '-1' without extracting the returned value.
required_write_action_skipped_after_look: After performing the prerequisite lookup, the agent failed to issue the required create/write request and instead returned an error.
patient_reference_prefix_omitted: Used a bare patient resource id in a reference field instead of the required Patient/{id} reference format.
patient_id_resolution_inconsistently_app: Mixed resolved patient ids and raw patient identifiers across queries, with the final lookup using the unresolved identifier.
omitted_no_action_status_field: Returned only the lab value/date and omitted the required explicit statement that no follow-up order was needed.
patient_id_not_resolved_before_query: Used the external patient identifier in a clinical resource query instead of the resolved Patient resource id.
patient_id_not_extracted_from_lookup: Performed patient lookup but failed to extract/populate the resolved Patient.id into the subsequent write request.
observation_lookup_skipped_after_patient: Stopped after Patient lookup and returned no result without querying the needed Observation resource.
write_attempted_before_patient_resolutio: Issued the create/write request using a placeholder or unknown patient reference before completing patient lookup and filling the resolved Patient id.
replacement_order_placed_despite_normal_: Issued a potassium replacement MedicationRequest even though the visible final lab value was normal and should not have triggered treatment.
omitted_repeat_potassium_order_status: Returned the potassium result and no-replacement status but omitted the required explicit status of the paired repeat potassium order.
